title: Dioscorea theresensis
taxonomy: Dioscorea theresensis is classified as a species within the genus Dioscorea, which belongs to the family Dioscoreaceae, commonly known as the yam family. This classification places Dioscorea theresensis within the order Dioscoreales. The family Dioscoreaceae is part of the monocot clade, indicating that Dioscorea theresensis has characteristics typical of monocots. The plant is native to the tropical regions of South America, where it grows as a perennial vine. Its classification as a member of the Dioscoreaceae family highlights its evolutionary relationships with other yam species.
